parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, use: title, description, status, for descending order use '-' e.g. &sort=-title

parameters.name: fields[products]
parameters.description: Partial attributes as specified, e.g. fields[products]=title,publish_status

parameters.name: filter[title_cont]
parameters.description: Filter by title contains, for example ?filter[title_cont]=marketing

parameters.name: filter[description_cont]
parameters.description: Filter by description contains, for example ?filter[description_cont]=marketing

parameters.name: filter[status_eq]
parameters.description: Filter by status equals, for example ?filter[status_eq]=ready

parameters.name: filter[exclude_product_types][]
parameters.description: Exclude products by productizable_type (fully-qualified, e.g. Courses::CohortCourse). Repeatable.

200.description: Success, list of products which the current user may access
